steps.title: Identify the coefficients
steps.content: For $x^2+43x+1=0$, the quadratic formula uses $a=1$, $b=43$, and $c=1$.

steps.title: Substitute into the formula
steps.content: One solution from the quadratic formula is $$x=\frac{-b+\sqrt{b^2-4ac}}{2a}$$ Substituting $a=1$, $b=43$, and $c=1$ gives $$x=\frac{-43+\sqrt{(43)^2-4(1)(1)}}{2(1)}$$ The answer is A.
